word: H760 - אֲרַם צֹובָה - ʼĂram Tsôwbâh - ar-am' tso-baw' - Aram-zobah

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארם צובה

Transliteration: 'ăram tsôbâh

Phonetic: ar-am' tso-baw'

BDB Definition:

Aram-zobah = "exalted station: exalted conflict"
  1. probably the land northeast of Damascus

Origin: from H758 and H6678

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
